speaker: speaker1
text: Now please tell me something about your past work achievements .

speaker: speaker2
text: All right , madam . When I was sales manager at the Beijing Friendship Store . I succeeded in raising the yearly sales volume by 25 % and profit margins from 50 % to 80 % .

speaker: speaker1
text: That is quite an achievement ! Do you consider it your most rewarding work experience ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I don't think so . I'll create further achievement in the future .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . I got the title of " Advance Worker " in 2006 .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . I wrote a thesis entitled " On Interpersonal Relations in the Socialist Market Economy " and it was published in China Daily .
